title: Judge verdict (on one idea)
description: What the Judge records for a single idea, referenced by id. `scores` are the learning signal (recorded for calibration, NOT used to rank); `rank`/`decision` are the outcome, set by de-biased pairwise. One verdict per idea under <sandbox_root>/iter<N>/verdicts/.

idea_id.description: The id of the idea this verdict scores.

critique.description: Short critique sent back to the agent.
